use_cases: Navigate between pages of paginated content like article listings or search results
Trigger discrete actions within forms, dialogs, or modal interfaces
Switch between different views or filter categories in data-driven applications
Build pagination controls for tables, lists, or product grids
Navigate through multi-step forms or onboarding wizards
ai_summary: A reusable pagination button component with multiple style variants (default, outline, ghost, secondary) and size options. Built with Radix UI Slot for flexible composition, CVA for type-safe variant handling, and includes proper focus-visible states for accessibility. Works as an atomic building block for pagination controls in various content navigation scenarios.
